productDisplayName: Peter England Men Black Formal Trousers
description: Style Note Crafted from a soft cotton fabric, these trousers from peter england will keep you feeling comfortable while giving you a suitably professional look. Team them with a crisp formal shirt, classy accessories and leather shoes. Product Details Black trouser made of 100% cotton, has flat front, pockets on the sides, two pockets at the back with button closures, brand badge above the left back pocket, looped waist, and a zipper and button closure on the front Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm in a gentle cycle, using a mild detergent Use only non-chlorine bleach if needed Tumble dry low Warm iron Size and Fit Smart Fit The model (height 6' and waist 32&rdquo ) is wearing a size 30
